lines.text: Ross is in Central Perk. Phoebe comes in.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh hey Ross oh I'm so glad someone's here could you zip me up?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: sure.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thank you. Can you believe no-one between my apartment and here offered to do that for me?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: people (shakes head, they sit) so why you all dressed up.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: oh umm Mike's picking me up for a date.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: oh yea now um how is that going, is it getting serious?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: oh I dunno I dunno, you know I mean I like him but am I ready to take my grade a loins off the meat market.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: you know I really admire your whole dating attitude, it's so healthy I'm always like is this moving to fast? Is this moving to slow? Where's this going?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: yea you know you are a bit of a drama queen.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: but you, your so much better off you just go from guy to guy having fun and never worrying that it terns into anything serious.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I wouldn't say never, you know there's that guy (pause) well what about (pause) ok well there's gotta be someone.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: There isn't that's what I'm saying. (All happy)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my god you're right.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I know and yet here you are all ready for the next date.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I can't believe I never realized this before, I'm in my thirty's and never been in a long-term relationship oh my god (starts crying) what's wrong with me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: no, no, no there's nothing wrong with you I mean you don't strike me as the type of person that wants to get married anyway.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I wanna get married (grabs a tissue)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: please don't cry because of me pheebs I don't know what I'm talking about, I've been divorced three times.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: least you've been married, OH MY GOD! I wanna trade lives with Ross (cries more)

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Phoebe (comes in smiling then sees Phoebe crying) what's wrong?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: nothing, I'm excited about our date, Mike this is Ross Geller this is Mike Haaaaa (starts crying)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm sorry I didn't catch.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: its Mike Hanagen

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh Ross Geller

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Hey, so are you sure your ready to go.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: uh huh (terns to Ross) how do I look (all her make up has gone everywhere)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: do you have a compact in your purse?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (goes to cry) No

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: you look great.
Opening Credits
Monica enters Central Perk.
Monica:: hey Joey

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, this girl won't turn around and I can't tell whether she's hot or not, what do you think?
Monica:: Joey I am not going to objectify woman with you (looks at the woman) but if her face is as nice as her ass woah mamma.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Alright thanks, Oh hey have you talked to Chandler?
Monica:: yeah he has to stay in Tulsa this weekend

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: how come?
Monica:: he has to work, there's some rush on the big (pause, thinks) ah damn it one of these days I'm really gonna have to start listening when he talks about his job.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: oh why don't you fly out there and surprise him.
Monica:: maybe I will go (thinks) yea will have a second honeymoon at the Tulsa romana.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: oh and you know what you should bring the black see-through teddy with the attached garters. (Nods)
Monica:: how do you know I have one of those?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: didn't till just now.
Monica goes to the back and Joey looks at the girl

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: hot not hot (she turns around) Hot!

lines.speaker: Hayley
lines.text: excuse me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I said I think you're hot and now I'm embarrassed.

lines.speaker: Hayley
lines.text: oh I thought you said Hi.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: that would've been better, I'll try that Hi I'm Joey.

lines.speaker: Hayley
lines.text: I'm Hayley.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: look I don't usually ask out women that I meet in coffeehouses

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: HA!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (turns round) gesundheit

lines.speaker: Hayley
lines.text: I would love to go out with you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: really, great, did I actually ask you?

lines.speaker: Hayley
lines.text: no that's just where you were going I just figured that I'd help you out, you don't seem like the kind of guy that does this very a lot.

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: HA!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (turns round again) seriously Gunther you should see someone about that cold, if it gets much worse you could DIE! (Gunther looks scared)
Ross is at Phoebe's.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: so how'd the date go?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: well it was awful every time I thought about what you said I started crying.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So he hasn't called?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: would you call this girl? (Puts on a crying act) thanks-fo-r-a-love-ly-even-ing

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: now I feel terrible this is all my fault.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: well you not what you should feel terrible about, this could have been my serious guy he was sweet and smart and funny. Do you know how hard it is to meet a guy like that?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We are a rare breed.
Joey is back at Hayleys apartment.

lines.speaker: Hayley
lines.text: what a great dinner.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: yeah and hey thanks again for letting me having that last piece of cake at the restaurant.

lines.speaker: Hayley
lines.text: (laughs) your welcome again, I'm gonna make some coffee can I get you anything?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: do you have any cake?
Hayley laughs and goes into the kitchen thinking it's a joke, Joey doesn't see what's so funny about it
>>> Joey's Subconscious

So this is going pretty good. dinner was nice, got a lot in common. (Sees a magazine) Victoria's secret huh we even like the same books. (Walks over to a painting on the wall) Oh now there's a scary painting. wait a minute I think I've been scared by that painting before. (Looks around) You know what this whole place look familiar I have definitely been in this apartment I know I've seen this weird plant before (it's a cactus and he touch's it) AWCH! It did that the last time. Oh my god, I've gone out with this girl before yeah we had sex on this couch and then on that chair and no. no we didn't do it hear which is weird because it seems like a perfectly good place.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (bends down to see and the cactus pricks him in the ass) AWCH! That's why.
Ross goes to see Mike to explain about Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (He knocks at the door, Mike opens it) Hey Mike sorry to just drop by like this, can I come in?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Sure (looks confused) who are you?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm Ross, Phoebe's friend from the coffeehouse.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: yeah I really, really need to talk to you about something.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Ok, unless you're not gonna try to get me to join a cult are you?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (laughs) No

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: oh it's just you have that look (shuts the front door)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Damn super cuts!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: what's up is Phoebe ok?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: oh no yeah, no Phoebe is great, but umm I'm an idiot look right before you guys went out I accidentally got her all upset.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: that's why she was weird.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: yes, yeah I said something stupid about her never having had a serious relationship, but you should know she is so much fun, a wonderful person please don't blow her off.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: I'm not blowing her off, I actually just got off the phone with her, were going out tomorrow night, I mean I hope that's ok with you stranger from the coffee house.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: well then I didn't need to bother you or the four other Mike Hanagens I bothered.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: hey wait wait wait wait wait! Is that true what you said Phoebe's never had a serious relationship?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: of course she has. if she'd never had a serious relationship I'd go round broadcasting it like some unstoppable moron.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: but you did say it

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: yes, yes I did. and I will also say what I'm about to say Vis-a-vis the following Phoebe has never had a serious relationship since her. super-serious relationship with. Vicrum.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Vicrum?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: WHAT THAT'S A REAL NAME!
Chandler arrives home from work.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (enters singing) Oklahoma where the wind comes sweeping down the plane, STOP IT! Why couldn't they have sent me to Texas? 7 o clock maybe I'll hit the gym (sits down) who am I kidding pay-per-view porn.
-Cuts to Monica (She's just arrived outside his room she fixes a bent photo hanging on the wall then sprays mint in her mouth and enter

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: DO NOT DISTURB DO NOT DISTURB! Monica: (smiles)
Monica:: is everything all right?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: everything's great, just watching some regular television there, what a pleasant surprise. (She hugs him, and she knows what he was doing so she looks at the TV and sees sharks swimming around thinking Chandler was giving himself a treat to sharks.)
Monica:: I'm gonna go freshen up ok

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ok honey. that was close.
-Cut to Rachel (Phone ringing

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hello
Monica:: Hey Rach its me ok I just got the Chandler's room and I caught him molesting himself.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh that couldn't have been pretty. but you know guys do that.
Monica:: yea well the weird part is... he was getting off to a shark attack show!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Nooooooooo!
Monica:: Yes! Chandler Watches Shark Porn!
Commercial Break
Rachel is at Monica's, talking about Chandler & him watching "Shark Porn".

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: well watching sharks? Are you sure that's what he was doing?
Monica:: do you know how many times I've seen him jump up like that, believe me I know what he was doing.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: man sharks. I always knew there was something weird about that dude. But you promised to love him no matter what.
Monica:: what means if he gets like a disease or kills someone. not if he gets his jollys to jaws!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ah! You know what honey guys are just different, they like things that we can't understand, you know I once dated this guy who wanted to pretend he was an archeologist and I was a naughty cave woman that he unfroze from a block of ice.
Monica:: Eww are you talking about my bother.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: yeah I didn't disguise that very well did i.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (enters) Hey

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (sits down) Hi

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: listen to this... I went out with this girl last night and half way through our date I realized I already slept with her.
Monica makes a strange face and sits down

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: so basically you've slept with all the woman in New York and now you're just going around again.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: well that's not even the weird part. I don't think she remembered sleeping with me.
Monica:: But you don't remember sleeping with her.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: yeah but she should remember sleeping with me I am very memorable, you guys know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: what, how do we know, we never slept with you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: and who's fault is that.
Monica:: what's the big deal, you forgot, she forgot, maybe you were having an off night

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: HEY! I never have an off night ok although sometimes when I'm a little bloated I don't feel very sexy BUT EVEN THEN I'M BETTER THEN MOST!
Monica:: Honey why don't you just let it go and ask her out again.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: yeah your both so slutty you don't even remember who you've slept with, you're made for each other.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Interesting. all right I'll go out with her again and try to get past it (reaches for the chips) OH SALT BLOATY!
Monica:: Joey, Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?
Monica:: you don't think sharks are sexy do you?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No. (Pause) wait a minute what was the little mermaid?
Monica just looks at him, and Rachel wants to laugh
Phoebe's at her apartment waiting for Mike Ross comes over.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It's open.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: HEY! Mike called were going out again! YAY! YAY! (She dances around with happiness)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: YAY! (He continues the happiness with her by dancing around) quick thing, I went to talk to Mike.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What? Wha-wha-wha-did you do ROSS!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: oh boy you got mad at that part. I went over there to tell him how great you are but you know me BLAH, BLAH, BLAH, and I ended up telling him that.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: WHAT!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: umm. that you had a six year long relationship with a guy named Vicrum.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: WHAT! WHY?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: well he seemed to bum hard that you'd never been in a serious relationship.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (Walks towards Ross) If you hadn't just had a baby with my best friend I swear to Lucifer a raber dog would be feasting on your danglers RIGHT NOW!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: well Phoebe, I think you'll feel better when you know a little bit about Vicrum, His a Kite designer (He makes a wow face) and he used to date Oprah. (He makes another wow face)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm not going along with some lie you made Ross, No I'm just gonna be honest with him.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Good yeah just be honest with him.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: yeah I've nothing to be ashamed of ok so I haven't been in a relationship that lasted longer then a month. Ok I haven't had a real boyfriend you know if he can't handle that he can leave. which he will and that's ok. so I'll just be alone forever you know alright I'll be. it'll be fine. it'll be fine. I'll go walking tours with widows and lesbians. Oh (takes a deep breath and sits down, knock on the door)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'll get it

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: ok

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: (Ross opens the door) You know I'm trying to think of the last time I opened a door and you weren't there, Phoebe are you ok? (She has her hands over her mouth)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh huh yeah (stands up) there's just something umm, there's something you should know (Pause) Vicrum just called.
Joey is back at Hayley's place after there date.

lines.speaker: Hayley
lines.text: so it was kind of a shock after 25 years of marriage my parents, a perfect couple getting divorced, I kinda took it the hardest cause I was the youngest.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh huh, sure, yeah. How can you not remember me?

lines.speaker: Hayley
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How could you not remember that we slept together?

lines.speaker: Hayley
lines.text: What! When?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I dunno!

lines.speaker: Hayley
lines.text: I really, really think I would remember sleeping with you

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: come on, come on, search your brain all right. it was (thinks) a certain amount of time ago, I was here you were here, we had sex (starts pointing out the places) here, here, here NOT there. Anything?

lines.speaker: Hayley
lines.text: no it's not ringing any bells.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: my god woman! How many people do you have to had been with not to remember any of this?

lines.speaker: Hayley's roommate
lines.text: Hey Hayley you've really gotta fix that doorknob. Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ooooooooooh, I slept with you! And you obviously remember me Hey! I still got it. (Turns back to Hayley) so were good. (She just glares at him) I'll let myself out.
Phoebe is sitting with Mike, explaining about Vicrum.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: .and I said Vicrum you can't just call every time you get lonely you know, you, you gave up that right when you slept with Rachel.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: But Rachel I thought she just had a baby with Ross

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: yeah well (pause) yeah you know Emma's birth certificate might say Geller but her eyes say Mookurgee.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: that is so wrong and on top of that his a glue sniffer.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know but he call's and my heart goes to him. You know that bastard is one smooth talking free lance kite designer.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: I just think there's somebody better out there for you, (pause) I mean I'm not saying me but. maybe me.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: and you don't have to worry about glue sniffing with me. although I do smell the occasional magic marker, yeah ah anyway I just think I can make you happy.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: ok I can't do this.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: what's wrong?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: well there is no Vicrum, Ross made him up because I never really have been in a long-term relationship, I've never lived with a guy, and I've never even celebrated an anniversary so. (Pause) if that's too weird for you and you wanna leave I totally understand. In fact I'll close my eye's make it less awkward (She sits with her eyes closed and Mike kisses her, Phoebe opens her eyes and like a little child says.) You kissed me.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: uh huh

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: so you don't think I'm a total freak

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: No. well look can I think your weird and also cool for telling me the truth and also wanna kiss you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I guess so, can I. can I think it's cool that you kiss me and also wanna kiss you again (they get closer to kiss and Phoebe pulls back) and umm, be a little concerned about the magic markers.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Definitely

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (They kiss and the phone rings and machine picks it up, its Ross putting on an accent pretending to be Vicrum) This is Vicrum.
Chandler arrives home and Monica's got a video of Sharks ready for Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi honey I'm home!
Monica:: Hi, how was your flight? (She hugs him

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: oh it was great.
Monica:: Here why don't you sit down, get yourself comfortable because I. (Monica shows him the tape then puts it in) have a little surprise for you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: well, well, well it must be five in Tulsa because it's six o clock IN NY.C!
Monica:: Ok (sits down next to him) This is how much I love you. (She presses play then puts her arm around Chandler's neck.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (Chandler looking confused) Honey why am I watching a bunch of sharks swimming around.
Monica:: Is this not the good part? Do you want me to fast forward to something a little toothier.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: no I'm not quite sure you got the right movie that's all.
Monica:: Oh well this is the only one they had at our video store, but they did have something called crocodile killers. Or does it always have to be sharks?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: does what always have to be sharks.
Monica:: Honey look we can do something else, do you want me to get into the tub and thrash.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What's going on?
Monica:: sweetie it's ok, I still love you, let me be a part of this.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: let ME be a part of this!
Monica:: I saw what you were doing in Tulsa. angry sharks turn you on!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: no they don't
Monica:: then why were you watching them and giving YOURSELF a treat.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: OH MY GOD! When you came in I switched the channel, I was just watching regular porn
Monica:: really?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: yeah just some good old fashion girl on girl American action.
Monica:: I cannot tell you how happy that makes me! (They hug

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You are an amazing wife. (Monica shrugs) No really you're amazing you were actually gonna do this for me, I mean where do you find the strength and understanding over something like that.
Monica:: Im very, very drunk right now.
They hug, Scene fades to black
Phoebe is in central-perk with Joey telling him what Ross said t her at the beginning.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (looks at a girl walk in) see ordinarily I would talk to her, but my confidence is shaken did I sleep with her? Did I not sleep with her?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: you know maybe this is a wake up call, about your whole dating attitude. Your in your thirty's and you've never had a serious relationship and you have never been in a long term relationship, here you go from woman to woman, meaningless experience to meaningless experience never even worrying that it doesn't tern into anything serious.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: your right! I love my life! (He gets up to go and speak to the girl and he turns back and sits down) I actually did sleep with her.
